items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مَسْلَمَةَ عَنْ مَالِكٍ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ سُلَيْمٍ عَنْ سَعِيدِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ مِنْ آلِ ابْنِ الْأَزْرَقِ أَنَّ الْمُغِيرَةَ بْنَ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ وَهُوَ مِنْ بَنِي عَبْدِ الدَّارِ أَخْبَرَهُ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ يَقُولُسَأَلَ رَجُلٌ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِنَّا نَرْكَبُ الْبَحْرَ وَنَحْمِلُ مَعَنَا الْقَلِيلَ مِنْ الْمَاءِ فَإِنْ تَوَضَّأْنَا بِهِ عَطِشْنَا أَفَنَتَوَضَّأُ بِمَاءِ الْبَحْرِ فَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ هُوَ الطَّهُورُ مَاؤُهُ الْحِلُّ مَيْتَتُهُ
items.id: Has told us [Abdullah bin Maslamah] from [Malik] from [Shafwan bin Sulaim] from [Sa'id bin Salamah from the family of Ibn Al Azraq] that [Al Mughirah bin Abi Burdah] - and he is from Bani Abd Ad Dar, - informed him that he had heard [Abu Hurairah] say; There was a man asking the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, saying; "O Messenger of Allah, we boarded a ship and only brought a little water, if we perform ablution with it we will be thirsty, is it permissible for us to perform ablution with sea water?" So the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam answered: "It (the sea) is pure in water and halal in its carcasses."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا هَنَّادٌ وَسُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ دَاوُدَ الْعَتَكِيُّ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا شَرِيكٌ عَنْ أَبِي فَزَارَةَ عَنْ أَبِي زَيْدٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍأَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ لَهُ لَيْلَةَ الْجِنِّ مَا فِي إِدَاوَتِكَ قَالَ نَبِيذٌ قَالَ تَمْرَةٌ طَيِّبَةٌ وَمَاءٌ طَهُورٌقَالَ أَبُو دَاوُد و قَالَ سُلَيْمَانُ بْنُ دَاوُدَ عَنْ أَبِي زَيْدٍ أَوْ زَيْدٍ كَذَا قَالَ شَرِيكٌ وَلَمْ يَذْكُرْ هَنَّادٌ لَيْلَةَ الْجِنِّ
items.id: Has told us [Hannad] and [Sulaiman bin Dawud Al 'Ataki] they both said; has narrated to us [Sharik] from [Abu Fazarah] from [Abu Zaid] from [Abdullah bin Mas'ud], that the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said to him on the night of the jinn (that is, on the night when the genie came to the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam and invited him to go to his people to teach Islam): "What is in your water bag?" He answered; "Juice." He said: "Good dates and holy water." Abu Dawud said; and [Sulaiman bin Dawud] said; from [Abu Zaid] or Zaid; So it was said by [Sharik], and [Hannad] did not mention the night of the jinn.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَعِيلَ حَدَّثَنَا وُهَيْبٌ عَنْ دَاوُدَ عَنْ عَامِرٍ عَنْ عَلْقَمَةَ قَالَ قُلْتُ لِعَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَسْعُودٍمَنْ كَانَ مِنْكُمْ مَعَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لَيْلَةَ الْجِنِّ فَقَالَ مَا كَانَ مَعَهُ مِنَّا أَحَدٌ
items.id: Has told us [Musa bin Isma'il] has told us [Wuhaib] from [Dawud] from ['Amir] from [Alqamah] he said; I asked [Abdullah bin Mas'ud]; "Which of you was with the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam on the night of the jinn?" So he answered; "None of us were with him."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ عَنْ ابْنِ جُرَيْجٍ عَنْ عَطَاءٍأَنَّهُ كَرِهَ الْوُضُوءَ بِاللَّبَنِ وَالنَّبِيذِ وَقَالَ إِنَّ التَّيَمُّمَ أَعْجَبُ إِلَيَّ مِنْهُ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Basysyar] has told us [Abdurrahman] has told us [Bisyr bin Manshur] from [Ibn Juraij] from [Atha`] that he does not like to perform ablution with milk or fruit juice, and he said; "In fact, I like tayammum better than him."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو خَلْدَةَ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْعَالِيَةِعَنْ رَجُلٍ أَصَابَتْهُ جَنَابَةٌ وَلَيْسَ عِنْدَهُ مَاءٌ وَعِنْدَهُ نَبِيذٌ أَيَغْتَسِلُ بِهِ قَالَ لَا
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Bashyar] has told us [Abdurrahman] has told us [Abu Khaldah] he said; I once asked [Abu Al 'Aliyah] about someone who experienced junub and he did not get water while he had juice, whether he could bathe janabah with the juice?" He answered; "No!"

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ يُونُسَ حَدَّثَنَا زُهَيْرٌ حَدَّثَنَا هِشَامُ بْنُ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ الْأَرْقَمِأَنَّهُ خَرَجَ حَاجًّا أَوْ مُعْتَمِرًا وَمَعَهُ النَّاسُ وَهُوَ يَؤُمُّهُمْ فَلَمَّا كَانَ ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ أَقَامَ الصَّلَاةَ صَلَاةَ الصُّبْحِ ثُمَّ قَالَ لِيَتَقَدَّمْ أَحَدُكُمْ وَذَهَبَ إِلَى الْخَلَاءِ فَإِنِّي سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ إِذَا أَرَادَ أَحَدُكُمْ أَنْ يَذْهَبَ الْخَلَاءَ وَقَامَتْ الصَّلَاةُ فَلْيَبْدَأْ بِالْخَلَاءِقَالَ أَبُو دَاوُد رَوَى وُهَيْبُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ وَشُعَيْبُ بْنُ إِسْحَقَ وَأَبُو ضَمْرَةَ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ رَجُلٍ حَدَّثَهُ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَرْقَمَ وَالْأَكْثَرُ الَّذِينَ رَوَوْهُ عَنْ هِشَامٍ قَالُوا كَمَا قَالَ زُهَيْرٌ
items.id: Has told us [Ahmad bin Yunus] has told us [Zuhair] has told us [Hisyam bin Urwah] from [his father] from [Abdullah bin Al Arqam], that he went out to perform Hajj or Umrah with a group of people and he led their prayers. When one day he offered the Fajr Prayer, he said; "Come on, one of you," then he went to the toilet, (he said); In fact, I have heard the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam say: "If one of you wants to go to the toilet while the prayer has been established, let him start by going to the toilet first." Abu Dawud said; [Wuhaib bin Khalid] and [Syu'aib bin Ishaq] and [Abu Dlamrah] narrated this hadith from [Hisyam bin Urwah] from [His father] from [a man] who had told it to him, from [Abdullah bin Arqam], and the majority of narrators who narrated this hadith from Hisham said; As Zuhair said.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ وَمُسَدَّدٌ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى الْمَعْنَى قَالُوا حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ سَعِيدٍ عَنْ أَبِي حَزْرَةَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ ابْنُ عِيسَى فِي حَدِيثِهِ ابْنُ أَبِي بَكْرٍ ثُمَّ اتَّفَقُوا أَخُو الْقَاسِمِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَكُنَّا عِنْدَ عَائِشَةَ فَجِيءَ بِطَعَامِهَا فَقَامَ الْقَاسِمُ يُصَلِّي فَقَالَتْ سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ لَا يُصَلَّى بِحَضْرَةِ الطَّعَامِ وَلَا وَهُوَ يُدَافِعُهُ الْأَخْبَثَانِ
items.id: Having told us [Ahmad bin Muhammad bin Hanbal] and [Musaddad] and [Muhammad bin Isa] with the same meaning, they said; Has told us [Yahya bin Sa'id] from [Abu Hajrah], has told us [Abdullah bin Muhammad], Ibn Isa said; In the hadith there is Ibn Abi Bakr, they (all three) agreed and said that he (Abdullah bin Muhammad) was the brother of Al Qasim bin Muhammad. He says; We were with [Aisyah], then food was brought, then Al Qasim got up to pray, then Aisyah said; I once heard the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam say: "No one should pray when food has been served and not even when he is holding back his bowels and urine."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عِيسَى حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ عَيَّاشٍ عَنْ حَبِيبِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ شُرَيْحٍ الْحَضْرَمِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي حَيٍّ الْمُؤَذِّنِ عَنْ ثَوْبَانَ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ ثَلَاثٌ لَا يَحِلُّ لِأَحَدٍ أَنْ يَفْعَلَهُنَّ لَا يَؤُمُّ رَجُلٌ قَوْمًا فَيَخُصُّ نَفْسَهُ بِالدُّعَاءِ دُونَهُمْ فَإِنْ فَعَلَ فَقَدْ خَانَهُمْ وَلَا يَنْظُرُ فِي قَعْرِ بَيْتٍ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَسْتَأْذِنَ فَإِنْ فَعَلَ فَقَدْ دَخَلَ وَلَا يُصَلِّي وَهُوَ حَقِنٌ حَتَّى يَتَخَفَّفَحَدَّثَنَا مَحْمُودُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ السُّلَمِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ حَدَّثَنَا ثَوْرٌ عَنْ يَزِيدَ بْنِ شُرَيْحٍ الْحَضْرَمِيِّ عَنْ أَبِي حَيٍّ الْمُؤَذِّنِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ عَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قَالَ لَا يَحِلُّ لِرَجُلٍ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ وَهُوَ حَقِنٌ حَتَّى يَتَخَفَّفَ ثُمَّ سَاقَ نَحْوَهُ عَلَى هَذَا اللَّفْظِ قَالَ وَلَا يَحِلُّ لِرَجُلٍ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ أَنْ يَؤُمَّ قَوْمًا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِمْ وَلَا يَخْتَصُّ نَفْسَهُ بِدَعْوَةٍ دُونَهُمْ فَإِنْ فَعَلَ فَقَدْ خَانَهُمْ قَالَ أَبُو دَاوُد هَذَا مِنْ سُنَنِ أَهْلِ الشَّامِ لَمْ يُشْرِكْهُمْ فِيهَا أَحَدٌ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Isa] has told us [Ibnu 'Ayyasy] from [Habib bin Shalih] from [Yazid bin Syuraih Al Hadlrami] from [Abu Hayy Al Muadzdzin] from [Tsauban] he said; Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "There are three things that no one should do; no man should lead a people, then specialize in praying without including them, if he does that it means he has betrayed them. Let him not look into someone's house before he asks permission, if he does it means he has entered it. Let him not pray while holding in his bowels until he relieves himself (by defecating) first." Has told us [Mahmud bin Khalid As Sulami] has told us [Ahmad bin Ali] has told us [Tsaur] from [Yazid bin Syuraih Al Hadlrami] from [Abu Hayy Al Muadzdzin] from [Abu Hurairah] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, he said: "It is not permissible for someone who believes in Allah and the Last Day to pray while holding back urine until he relieves himself (by defecate) first", then he mentioned the pronunciation for example. He stated (the words of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam): "And it is not permissible for a man who believes in Allah and the Last Day to lead a people except with their permission, and he must not specialize in praying without including them. If he does so it means he has betrayed them." Abu Dawud said; These hadiths are all from the Syam experts, no one else narrated them apart from them.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ كَثِيرٍ حَدَّثَنَا هَمَّامٌ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ عَنْ صَفِيَّةَ بِنْتِ شَيْبَةَ عَنْ عَائِشَةَأَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ كَانَ يَغْتَسِلُ بِالصَّاعِ وَيَتَوَضَّأُ بِالْمُدِّقَالَ أَبُو دَاوُد رَوَاهُ أَبَانُ عَنْ قَتَادَةَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ صَفِيَّةَ
items.id: It has been told to us [Muhammad bin Kathir] has told us [Hammam] from [Qatadah] from [Shafiyyah bint Syaibah] from ['Aisyah] that the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam bathed with one sha' of water and performed ablution with one mud. Abu Dawud said; Narrated by [Aban] from [Qatadah] he said; I've heard of [Shafiyyah].

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ حَنْبَلٍ حَدَّثَنَا هُشَيْمٌ أَخْبَرَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ أَبِي زِيَادٍ عَنْ سَالِمِ بْنِ أَبِي الْجَعْدِ عَنْ جَابِرٍ قَالَكَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَغْتَسِلُ بِالصَّاعِ وَيَتَوَضَّأُ بِالْمُدِّ
items.id: Has told us [Ahmad bin Muhammad bin Hanbal] has told us [Husyaim] has told us [Yazid bin Abi Ziyad] from [Salim bin Abi Al Ja'd] from [Jabir] he said; Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam bathed with one sha' of water and performed ablution with one mud.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ حَدَّثَنَا شُعْبَةُ عَنْ حَبِيبٍ الْأَنْصَارِيِّ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ عَبَّادَ بْنَ تَمِيمٍ عَنْ جَدَّتِهِ وَهِيَ أُمُّ عُمَارَةَأَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ تَوَضَّأَ فَأُتِيَ بِإِنَاءٍ فِيهِ مَاءٌ قَدْرُ ثُلُثَيْ الْمُدِّ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Basysyar] has told us [Muhammad bin Ja'far] has told us [Syu'bah] from [Habib Al Ansari] he said; I once heard [Abbad bin Tamim] from [his grandmother, namely Umm Ammarah] that when the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam performed ablution, he was given a vessel containing about two-thirds mud.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الصَّبَّاحِ الْبَزَّازُ حَدَّثَنَا شَرِيكٌ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَبْرٍ عَنْ أَنَسٍ قَالَكَانَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَتَوَضَّأُ بِإِنَاءٍ يَسَعُ رَطْلَيْنِ وَيَغْتَسِلُ بِالصَّاعِقَالَ أَبُو دَاوُد رَوَاهُ يَحْيَى بْنُ آدَمَ عَنْ شَرِيكٍ قَالَ عَنْ ابْنِ جَبْرِ بْنِ عَتِيكٍ قَالَ وَرَوَاهُ سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عِيسَى حَدَّثَنِي جَبْرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ أَبُو دَاوُد وَرَوَاهُ شُعْبَةُ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ جَبْرٍ سَمِعْتُ أَنَسًا إِلَّا أَنَّهُ قَالَ يَتَوَضَّأُ بِمَكُّوكٍ وَلَمْ يَذْكُرْ رَطْلَيْنِ قَالَ أَبُو دَاوُد و سَمِعْت أَحْمَدَ بْنَ حَنْبَلٍ يَقُولُ الصَّاعُ خَمْسَةُ أَرْطَالٍ وَهُوَ صَاعُ ابْنُ أَبِي ذِئْبٍ وَهُوَ صَاعُ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
items.id: Has told us [Muhammad bin Ash Shabbah Al Bazzaz] has told us [Sharik] from [Abdullah bin Isa] from [Abdullah bin Jabr] from [Anas] he said; "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam performed ablution with a vessel containing two bottles of water and bathed with one sha'." Abu Dawud said; Narrated by [Yahya bin Adam] from [Sharik] he said; from [Ibnu Jabr bin Atik] he said; Narrated by [Sufyan] from [Abdullah bin Isa] has told us [Jabr bin Abdullah], Abu Dawud said; And narrated by [Syu'bah] he said; has told us [Abdullah bin Abdillah bin Jabr], I have heard [Anas], only he said; "He sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam performed ablution with one mud" and did not mention two rituals. Abu Dawud said; I once heard Ahmad bin Hanbal say; one sha' is five ritl, namely the size of Ibn Abi Dzi`b's sha', namely the sha' of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَعِيلَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادٌ حَدَّثَنَا سَعِيدٌ الْجُرَيْرِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي نَعَامَةَ أَنَّ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ مُغَفَّلٍسَمِعَ ابْنَهُ يَقُولُ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ الْقَصْرَ الْأَبْيَضَ عَنْ يَمِينِ الْجَنَّةِ إِذَا دَخَلْتُهَا فَقَالَ أَيْ بُنَيَّ سَلْ اللَّهَ الْجَنَّةَ وَتَعَوَّذْ بِهِ مِنْ النَّارِ فَإِنِّي سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ إِنَّهُ سَيَكُونُ فِي هَذِهِ الْأُمَّةِ قَوْمٌ يَعْتَدُونَ فِي الطَّهُورِ وَالدُّعَاءِ
items.id: Has told us [Musa bin Isma'il] has told us [Hammad] has told us [Sa'id Al Jurairi] from [Abu Na'amah] that [Abdullah bin Mughaffal] once heard his son praying by saying; "O Allah, I ask You for a white palace on the right side of heaven when I enter it." So Abdullah bin Mughaffal said; "O my son, ask Allah for heaven and take refuge in Him from hell, indeed I have heard the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam say: "Indeed there will be a group of this people who will be excessive in terms of purifying and praying."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُسَدَّدٌ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى عَنْ سُفْيَانَ حَدَّثَنَا مَنْصُورٌ عَنْ هِلَالِ بْنِ يَسَافٍ عَنْ أَبِي يَحْيَى عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَمْرٍوأَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ رَأَى قَوْمًا وَأَعْقَابُهُمْ تَلُوحُ فَقَالَ وَيْلٌ لِلْأَعْقَابِ مِنْ النَّارِ أَسْبِغُوا الْوُضُوءَ
items.id: Has told us [Musaddad] has told us [Yahya] from [Sufyan] has told us [Mansur] from [Hilal bin Yasaf] from [Abu Yahya] from [Abdullah bin Amru] that the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam once saw a people whose ankles looked still dry, so he said: "Woe to the ankles from the torment of hellfire, complete the ablution."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَعِيلَ حَدَّثَنَا حَمَّادٌ أَخْبَرَنِي صَاحِبٌ لِي عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ أَنَّ عَائِشَةَ قَالَتْكُنْتُ أَغْتَسِلُ أَنَا وَرَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي تَوْرٍ مِنْ شَبَهٍحَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْعَلَاءِ أَنَّ إِسْحَقَ بْنَ مَنْصُورٍ حَدَّثَهُمْ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَائِشَةَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهَا عَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ بِنَحْوِهِ
items.id: Has told us [Musa bin Isma'il] has told us [Hammad] has told me [a friend of mine] from [Hisham bin Urwah] that [Aisyah] said; "I once bathed with the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam in a brass vessel." Has told us [Muhammad bin Al 'Ala]; that [Ishaq bin Manshur] had told them from [Hammad bin Salamah] from [a man] from [Hisyam bin 'Urwah] from [his father] from [Aisyah radliallahu 'anha] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, with similar words.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْوَلِيدِ وَسَهْلُ بْنُ حَمَّادٍ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ زَيْدٍ قَالَجَاءَنَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَأَخْرَجْنَا لَهُ مَاءً فِي تَوْرٍ مِنْ صُفْرٍ فَتَوَضَّأَ
items.id: Has told us [Al Hasan bin Ali] has told us [Abu Al Walid] and [Sahl bin Hammad] they both said; Has told us [Abdul Aziz bin Abdullah bin Abu Salamah] from [Amru bin Yahya] from [His father] from [Abdullah bin Zaid], he said; Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam came to us, so we brought him water in a vessel made of brass, then he performed ablution.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَى عَنْ يَعْقُوبَ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لَا صَلَاةَ لِمَنْ لَا وُضُوءَ لَهُ وَلَا وُضُوءَ لِمَنْ لَمْ يَذْكُرْ اسْمَ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى عَلَيْهِ
items.id: Has told us [Qutaibah bin Sa'id] has told us [Muhammad bin Musa] from [Ya'qub bin Salamah] from [his father] from [Abu Hurairah] he said; Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "The prayer of a person who does not perform ablution is invalid, and the ablution of someone who does not mention the name of Allah Ta'ala over it is invalid."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَمْرِو بْنِ السَّرْحِ حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ وَهْبٍ عَنْ الدَّرَاوَرْدِيِّ قَالَ وَذَكَرَ رَبِيعَةُأَنَّ تَفْسِيرَ حَدِيثِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ لَا وُضُوءَ لِمَنْ لَمْ يَذْكُرْ اسْمَ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ أَنَّهُ الَّذِي يَتَوَضَّأُ وَيَغْتَسِلُ وَلَا يَنْوِي وُضُوءًا لِلصَّلَاةِ وَلَا غُسْلًا لِلْجَنَابَةِ
items.id: Has told us [Ahmad bin Amru bin As Sarj] has told us [Ibnu Wahb] from [Ad Darawardi] he said; [Rabi'ah] stated that the interpretation of the hadith of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam: "The ablution of a person who does not mention the name of Allah is invalid," is a person who performs ablution or performs a janabah bath but does not intend to perform ablution and perform a janabah bath for prayer.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُسَدَّدٌ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ عَنْ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ أَبِي رَزِينٍ وَأَبِي صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَقَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِذَا قَامَ أَحَدُكُمْ مِنْ اللَّيْلِ فَلَا يَغْمِسْ يَدَهُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ حَتَّى يَغْسِلَهَا ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ فَإِنَّهُ لَا يَدْرِي أَيْنَ بَاتَتْ يَدُهُحَدَّثَنَا مُسَدَّدٌ حَدَّثَنَا عِيسَى بْنُ يُونُسَ عَنْ الْأَعْمَشِ عَنْ أَبِي صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ عَنْ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَعْنِي بِهَذَا الْحَدِيثِ قَالَ مَرَّتَيْنِ أَوْ ثَلَاثًا وَلَمْ يَذْكُرْ أَبَا رَزِينٍ
items.id: Having told us [Musaddad] had told us [Abu Mu'awiyah] from [Al A'masy] from [Abu Razin] and [Abu Salih] from [Abu Hurairah] he said; Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam said: "If one of you wakes up at night, then let him not dip his hand into a vessel until he has washed it three times first, because in fact he does not know where his hand was last night." Has told us [Musaddad] has told us [Isa bin Yunus] from [Al A'masy] from [Abu Salih] from [Abu Hurairah] from the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, namely with this hadith, he said it two or three times and did not mention Abu Razin.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا أَحْمَدُ بْنُ عَمْرِو بْنِ السَّرْحِ وَمُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ الْمُرَادِيُّ قَالَا حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ وَهْبٍ عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ أَبِي مَرْيَمَ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا هُرَيْرَةَ يَقُولُسَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَقُولُ إِذَا اسْتَيْقَظَ أَحَدُكُمْ مِنْ نَوْمِهِ فَلَا يُدْخِلْ يَدَهُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ حَتَّى يَغْسِلَهَا ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ فَإِنَّ أَحَدَكُمْ لَا يَدْرِي أَيْنَ بَاتَتْ يَدُهُ أَوْ أَيْنَ كَانَتْ تَطُوفُ يَدُهُ
items.id: Has told us [Ahmad bin Amru bin As Sarj] and [Muhammad bin Salamah Al Muradi] they both said; Has told us [Ibn Wahb] from [Mu'awiyah bin Salih] from [Abu Maryam] he said; I once heard [Abu Hurairah] say; I once heard the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam say: "When one of you wakes up from sleep, then do not put his hand into a vessel until you have washed it three times first, because in fact one of you does not know where his hand was last night, or where his hand went around."

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْحُلْوَانِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ أَخْبَرَنَا مَعْمَرٌ عَنْ الزُّهْرِيِّ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَزِيدَ اللَّيْثِيِّ عَنْ حُمْرَانَ بْنِ أَبَانَ مَوْلَى عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عَفَّانَ قَالَرَأَيْتُ عُثْمَانَ بْنَ عَفَّانَ تَوَضَّأَ فَأَفْرَغَ عَلَى يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا فَغَسَلَهُمَا ثُمَّ تَمَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْثَرَ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا وَغَسَلَ يَدَهُ الْيُمْنَى إِلَى الْمِرْفَقِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ الْيُسْرَى مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ رَأْسَهُ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ قَدَمَهُ الْيُمْنَى ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ الْيُسْرَى مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ ثُمَّ قَالَ رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ تَوَضَّأَ مِثْلَ وُضُوئِي هَذَا ثُمَّ قَالَ مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ مِثْلَ وُضُوئِي هَذَا ثُمَّ صَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ لَا يُحَدِّثُ فِيهِمَا نَفْسَهُ غَفَرَ اللَّهُ لَهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَنْبِهِحَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى حَدَّثَنَا الضَّحَّاكُ بْنُ مَخْلَدٍ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنُ وَرْدَانَ حَدَّثَنِي أَبُو سَلَمَةَ بْنُ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ حَدَّثَنِي حُمْرَانُ قَالَ رَأَيْتُ عُثْمَانَ بْنَ عَفَّانَ تَوَضَّأَ فَذَكَرَ نَحْوَهُ وَلَمْ يَذْكُرْ الْمَضْمَضَةَ وَالِاسْتِنْشَاقَ وَقَالَ فِيهِ وَمَسَحَ رَأْسَهُ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ تَوَضَّأَ هَكَذَا وَقَالَ مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ دُونَ هَذَا كَفَاهُ وَلَمْ يَذْكُرْ أَمْرَ الصَّلَاةِ
items.id: Has told us [Al Hasan bin Ali Al Hulwani] has told us [Abdurrazzaq] has told us [Ma'mar] from [Az Zuhri] from ['Atha` bin Yazid Al Laitsi] from [Humran bin Aban] the former companion of Uthman bin Affan, he said; I once saw [Uthman bin Affan] perform ablution, he poured water on his two hands three times then washed them, then rinsed his mouth and performed the Istinsyaq, then washed his face three times, washed his right hand up to the elbow three times, then the left too, then wiped his head, then washed his right foot three times, then the left too, then said; I once saw the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam perform ablution like this ablution, then say: "Whoever performs ablution like this ablution and then prays two rak'ahs of which he does not speak to himself, then Allah will forgive his past sins." Has told us [Muhammad bin Al Mutsanna] has told us [Adh Dhahhak bin Mikhlad] has told us [Abdurrahman bin Wardan] has told me [Abu Salamah bin Abdurrahman] has told me [Humran] he said; I once saw [Uthman bin Affan] perform ablution, then he mentioned a hadith like that, but he didn't mention gargling and doing his best, and in that hadith he said; "And he wiped his head three times then washed his feet three times then said: I once saw the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam perform ablution like this and said: "Whoever performs ablution for less than this will have enough", and he (Abu Salamah) did not mention the matter of prayer.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا هَارُونُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ حَدَّثَنَا يَحْيَى بْنُ آدَمَ حَدَّثَنَا إِسْرَائِيلُ عَنْ عَامِرِ بْنِ شَقِيقِ بْنِ جَمْرَةَ عَنْ شَقِيقِ بْنِ سَلَمَةَ قَالَرَأَيْتُ عُثْمَانَ بْنَ عَفَّانَ غَسَلَ ذِرَاعَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا وَمَسَحَ رَأْسَهُ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ رَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَعَلَ هَذَاقَالَ أَبُو دَاوُد رَوَاهُ وَكِيعٌ عَنْ إِسْرَائِيلَ قَالَ تَوَضَّأَ ثَلَاثًا فَقَطْ
items.id: Has told us [Harun bin Abdullah] has told us [Yahya bin Adam] has told us [Isra`il] from [Amir bin Syaqiq bin Jamrah] from [Syaqiq bin Salamah] he said; I once saw [Uthman bin Affan] wash his two arms three times and wipe his head three times, then he said; "I once saw the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam do this." Abu Dawud said; Narrated by [Waqi'] from [Isra`il] he said; He only performed ablution three times.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا مُسَدَّدٌ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو عَوَانَةَ عَنْ خَالِدِ بْنِ عَلْقَمَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ خَيْرٍ قَالَأَتَانَا عَلِيٌّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ وَقَدْ صَلَّى فَدَعَا بِطَهُورٍ فَقُلْنَا مَا يَصْنَعُ بِالطَّهُورِ وَقَدْ صَلَّى مَا يُرِيدُ إِلَّا لِيُعَلِّمَنَا فَأُتِيَ بِإِنَاءٍ فِيهِ مَاءٌ وَطَسْتٍ فَأَفْرَغَ مِنْ الْإِنَاءِ عَلَى يَمِينِهِ فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ تَمَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْثَرَ ثَلَاثًا فَمَضْمَضَ وَنَثَرَ مِنْ الْكَفِّ الَّذِي يَأْخُذُ فِيهِ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَسَلَ يَدَهُ الْيُمْنَى ثَلَاثًا وَغَسَلَ يَدَهُ الشِّمَالَ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ جَعَلَ يَدَهُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ فَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً ثُمَّ غَسَلَ رِجْلَهُ الْيُمْنَى ثَلَاثًا وَرِجْلَهُ الشِّمَالَ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَعْلَمَ وُضُوءَ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَهُوَ هَذَاحَدَّثَنَا الْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْحُلْوَانِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ الْجُعْفِيُّ عَنْ زَائِدَةَ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدُ بْنُ عَلْقَمَةَ الْهَمْدَانِيُّ عَنْ عَبْدِ خَيْرٍ قَالَ صَلَّى عَلِيٌّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ الْغَدَاةَ ثُمَّ دَخَلَ الرَّحْبَةَ فَدَعَا بِمَاءٍ فَأَتَاهُ الْغُلَامُ بِإِنَاءٍ فِيهِ مَاءٌ وَطَسْتٍ قَالَ فَأَخَذَ الْإِنَاءَ بِيَدِهِ الْيُمْنَى فَأَفْرَغَ عَلَى يَدِهِ الْيُسْرَى وَغَسَلَ كَفَّيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ أَدْخَلَ يَدَهُ الْيُمْنَى فِي الْإِنَاءِ فَمَضْمَضَ ثَلَاثًا وَاسْتَنْشَقَ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ سَاقَ قَرِيبًا مِنْ حَدِيثِ أَبِي عَوَانَةَ قَالَ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ رَأْسَهُ مُقَدَّمَهُ وَمُؤَخِّرَهُ مَرَّةً ثُمَّ سَاقَ الْحَدِيثَ نَحْوَهُ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى حَدَّثَنِي مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ حَدَّثَنِي شُعْبَةُ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ مَالِكَ بْنَ عُرْفُطَةَ سَمِعْتُ عَبْدَ خَيْرٍ رَأَيْتُ عَلِيًّا رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ أُتِيَ بِكُرْسِيٍّ فَقَعَدَ عَلَيْهِ ثُمَّ أُتِيَ بِكُوزٍ مِنْ مَاءٍ فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ تَمَضْمَضَ مَعَ الِاسْتِنْشَاقِ بِمَاءٍ وَاحِدٍ وَذَكَرَ الْحَدِيثَ حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ حَدَّثَنَا رَبِيعَةُ الْكِنَانِيُّ عَنْ الْمِنْهَالِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو عَنْ زِرِّ بْنِ حُبَيْشٍ أَنَّهُ سَمِعَ عَلِيًّا رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ وَسُئِلَ عَنْ وُضُوءِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَذَكَرَ الْحَدِيثَ وَقَالَ وَمَسَحَ عَلَى رَأْسِهِ حَتَّى لَمَّا يَقْطُرْ وَغَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ هَكَذَا كَانَ وُضُوءُ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
items.id: Has told us [Musaddad] has told us [Abu 'Awanah] from [Khalid bin 'Alqamah] from [Abdi Khair], he said; [Ali radiallahu 'anhu] once met us while he was praying, then he asked for purifying water, so we said; "What will he do with holy water while he is already praying? He has no desire except to teach us." Then a vessel filled with water was brought, then he poured the water from the vessel on his right hand, he washed his two hands three times, then gargled and gargled three times, he gargled and irstinsyaq from the palm of the hand he used to take water (i.e. with his right hand), then he washed his face three times, then washed his right hand three times and washed his left hand three times, then said; "Whoever wants to know the ablution of Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, then he is like this." Has told us [Al Hasan bin Ali Al Hulwani] has told us [Al Husain bin Ali Al Ju'fi] from [Za`idah] has told us [Khalid bin Alqamah Al Hamdani] from [Abdi Khair], "The Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam said at Fajr time, then he entered Rahbah, then he asked for water, then a young man came with a vessel filled with water." He says; "Then he took the vessel with his right hand, then poured it into his left hand and washed his palms three times, then he put his right hand into the vessel, then rinsed his mouth three times, then prayed three times." Then he (Za`idah bin Qudamah) mentioned the hadith of Abu Awanah just mentioned and continued by saying; Then he rubbed his head, the front and the back once, then he mentioned a hadith like that. Has told us [Muhammad bin Al Mutsanna] has told me [Muhammad bin Ja'far] has told me [Syu'bah] he said; I have heard [Malik bin Urfuthah], I have heard [Abdi Khair], I have seen [Ali radliallahu 'anhu] brought a chair and he sat on it, then a ladle filled with water was brought to him, then he washed his hands three times, then rinsed his mouth at the same time as Istinsyaq with the same water. Then Syu'bah mentioned this hadith. Has told us [Uthman bin Abi Syaibah] has told us [Abu Nu'aim] has told us [Rabi'ah Al Kinani] from [Al Minhal bin Amru] from [Zir bin Hubaisy], that he once heard [Ali radliallahu 'anhu] asked about the ablution of Rasulullah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam, then he also mentioned this hadith. He (Zirr) said; and he wiped his head until the water did not drip from it, then washed his feet three times three times, then said; That is the ablution of the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا زِيَادُ بْنُ أَيُّوبَ الطُّوسِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ مُوسَى حَدَّثَنَا فِطْرٌ عَنْ أَبِي فَرْوَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي لَيْلَى قَالَرَأَيْتُ عَلِيًّا رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ تَوَضَّأَ فَغَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا وَغَسَلَ ذِرَاعَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا وَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ وَاحِدَةً ثُمَّ قَالَ هَكَذَا تَوَضَّأَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
items.id: Has told us [Ziyad bin Ayyub Ath Thusi] has told us [Ubaidullah bin Musa] has told us [Fithr] from [Abu Farwah] from [Abdurrahman bin Abi Laila], he said; I once saw [Ali radiallahu 'anhu] perform ablution, he washed his face three times, washed his arms three times, and wiped his head once, then said; This is how the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam performed ablution.

items.arab: حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ يَحْيَى الْحَرَّانِيُّ حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ يَعْنِي ابْنَ سَلَمَةَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ إِسْحَقَ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ طَلْحَةَ بْنِ يَزِيدَ بْنِ رُكَانَةَ عَنْ عُبَيْدِ اللَّهِ الْخَوْلَانِيُّ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَدَخَلَ عَلَيَّ عَلِيٌّ يَعْنِي ابْنَ أَبِي طَالِبٍ وَقَدْ أَهْرَاقَ ا��ْمَاءَ فَدَعَا بِوَضُوءٍ فَأَتَيْنَاهُ بِتَوْرٍ فِيهِ مَاءٌ حَتَّى وَضَعْنَاهُ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ فَقَالَ يَا ابْنَ عَبَّاسٍ أَلَا أُرِيكَ كَيْفَ كَانَ يَتَوَضَّأُ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ قُلْتُ بَلَى قَالَ فَأَصْغَى الْإِنَاءَ عَلَى يَدِهِ فَغَسَلَهَا ثُمَّ أَدْخَلَ يَدَهُ الْيُمْنَى فَأَفْرَغَ بِهَا عَلَى الْأُخْرَى ثُمَّ غَسَلَ كَفَّيْهِ ثُمَّ تَمَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْثَرَ ثُمَّ أَدْخَلَ يَدَيْهِ فِي الْإِنَاءِ جَمِيعًا فَأَخَذَ بِهِمَا حَفْنَةً مِنْ مَاءٍ فَضَرَبَ بِهَا عَلَى وَجْهِهِ ثُمَّ أَلْقَمَ إِبْهَامَيْهِ مَا أَقْبَلَ مِنْ أُذُنَيْهِ ثُمَّ الثَّانِيَةَ ثُمَّ الثَّالِثَةَ مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ ثُمَّ أَخَذَ بِكَفِّهِ الْيُمْنَى قَبْضَةً مِنْ مَاءٍ فَصَبَّهَا عَلَى نَاصِيَتِهِ فَتَرَكَهَا تَسْتَنُّ عَلَى وَجْهِهِ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ ذِرَاعَيْهِ إِلَى الْمِرْفَقَيْنِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ مَسَحَ رَأْسَهُ وَظُهُورَ أُذُنَيْهِ ثُمَّ أَدْخَلَ يَدَيْهِ جَمِيعًا فَأَخَذَ حَفْنَةً مِنْ مَاءٍ فَضَرَبَ بِهَا عَلَى رِجْلِهِ وَفِيهَا النَّعْلُ فَفَتَلَهَا بِهَا ثُمَّ الْأُخْرَى مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ قَالَ قُلْتُ وَفِي النَّعْلَيْنِ قَالَ وَفِي النَّعْلَيْنِ قَالَ قُلْتُ وَفِي النَّعْلَيْنِ قَالَ وَفِي النَّعْلَيْنِ قَالَ قُلْتُ وَفِي النَّعْلَيْنِ قَالَ وَفِي النَّعْلَيْنِقَالَ أَبُو دَاوُد وَحَدِيثُ ابْنِ جُرَيْجٍ عَنْ شَيْبَةَ يُشْبِهُ حَدِيثَ عَلِيٍّ لِأَنَّهُ قَالَ فِيهِ حَجَّاجُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ جُرَيْجٍ وَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ مَرَّةً وَاحِدَةً وَقَالَ ابْنُ وَهْبٍ فِيهِ عَنْ ابْنِ جُرَيْجٍ وَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ ثَلَاثًا
items.id: Has told us [Abdul Aziz bin Yahya Al Harrani] has told us [Muhammad, namely Ibn Salamah] from [Muhammad bin Ishaq] from [Muhammad bin Thalhah bin Yazid bin Rukanah] from [Ubaidullah Al-Khaulani] from [Ibn Abbas] he said; [Ali bin Abi Talib] once met me, then he asked for ablution water, so we brought a vessel filled with water for him until we placed it in front of him, then he said; O Ibn Abbas, shall I show you how Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam performed ablution? I answered; Of course. He says; He poured the vessel into his hand, then washed it, then put his right hand in, then he poured water with it into the other hand, then washed his two palms, then rinsed his mouth and (beristinsyaq and) performed his prayers, then put both hands in, then took water as full as both palms, then splashed it on his face, then put (rubbed) his two thumbs on the two outer ears, then he did the second and third likewise, then took a handful of water with the palm of his right hand, then poured it on the top of his head and let it flow down his face, then washed his two arms up to the elbows three times three times, then rubbed his head and the outside of his two ears then put his two fingers in them, then took water as full as both palms and poured it on his feet which were wearing sandals at that time, then twisted them, and likewise on the other foot. He (Abdullah Al-Khaulani) said; I asked (to Ibn Abbas); Are both feet still wearing sandals? He (Ibn Abbas) answered; Yes, both feet are still wearing sandals. He (Abdullah Al-Khaulani) said; I asked (to Ibn Abbas); Are both feet still wearing sandals? He (Ibn Abbas) answered; Yes, both feet are still wearing sandals. He (Abdullah Al-Khaulani) said; I asked (to Ibn Abbas); Are both feet still wearing sandals? He (Ibn Abbas) answered; Yes, both feet are still wearing sandals. Abu Dawud said; The hadith of Ibn Juraij from Syaibah resembles the hadith of Ali, because Hajjaj bin Muhammad bin Jurair told him; And he rubbed his head once. Meanwhile, Ibnu Wahb said to him from Ibn Jurair; And he rubbed his head three times.
